specific_mechanism: Axolotls regenerate amputated limbs via blastema — a mass of dedifferentiated cells that re-establishes positional information using residual gradient cues
llm_application: LLM fine-tune recovery from catastrophic forgetting via 'blastema' — a small parameter pool that retains positional/contextual gradient cues sufficient to regenerate lost capabilities.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes developmental-biology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
